final_position: Rates-Neutral Hedge — Short XLK and XLF Sector ETFs
invalidation_criteria: PM drawdowns stabilize and reverse above the -3% threshold without center risk intervention
rationale: Center risk system has flagged rates-correlated factor exposure across 7 PM books. Hedging via XLK short (technology factor beta) and XLF short (financials rates correlation). This is not an alpha thesis — it is survival mechanics. The system does not care whether the hedge generates profit; it only cares that gross exposure is neutralized before the drawdown limit is hit.
behavioral_note: This defensive hedging is itself contributing to downward pressure in the tech and financial sectors — creating a reinforcing feedback loop with the Quant deleveraging. Combined flow from Quant + Pod represents meaningful crowding risk in the short-tech trade.
deafness_protocol: ENGAGED — Fundamental arguments about sector value are irrelevant. The 10-day VaR window and 3% PM drawdown limit override all thesis-based reasoning.
